impact: This gives operators deterministic recovery guidance for stuck PP&D daemon runs while preserving the project’s fail-closed requirements: no unattended authenticated DevHub work, no official-action side effects, and no private runtime artifacts committed to the repository.
summary: Adds PP&D supervisor operations documentation for persistent user-unit recovery, explicit daemon resume gates, and side-effect-free DevHub boundaries.
target_task: Task checkbox-448: Add PP&D supervisor operations documentation for persistent user-unit recovery, explicit daemon resume gates, and no live DevHub or official-action side effects.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
